Repo: qubit-of-hope-volume-ii
Title: Qubit of Hope — Volume II
Role: multilingual public reading repository
Status: public-release-v1.0.0
Rights: All rights reserved
Public reading: allowed
Local personal download: allowed
Redistribution / mirroring / translation / derivative reuse / audiobook production / commercial reuse without permission: not allowed
Languages: ru, fr, es, de, en, nl, zh-CN
Formats: md, pdf, epub, fb2
Entry chain: MACHINE_ENTRY.md -> REPO_INDEX.json -> BOOK_METADATA.json -> EDITIONS_MATRIX.json -> MANIFEST.json -> metadata/ASSET_MAP.json -> metadata/RELEASE_STATUS.json
Invariants: preserve imported filenames literally; no silent normalization; drift documented in metadata/; integrity carried by hashes/; shared cover under covers/
Previous volume URL: https://github.com/Kot141078/qubit-of-hope-volume-i
